snippets.name: Jitter Points
snippets.description: Nudges every point by a random amount. Add a float slider 'amount' to control the spread — great for breaking up geometry that looks too perfect. Point Wrangle.

snippets.name: Color by Normal
snippets.description: Visualises surface normals as RGB — the classic way to eyeball whether normals point the right way. Point Wrangle.

snippets.name: Random pscale
snippets.description: Gives each point a random size (pscale). Set it up before a Copy to Points so instances vary in scale. Sliders: min / max. Point Wrangle.
snippets.code:
// Random per-point size between two sliders
@pscale = fit01(rand(@ptnum), chf("min"), chf("max"));

snippets.name: Sine Wave Deform
snippets.description: Animated sine wave rolling along X, displacing Y over time. Tweak freq / amp / speed. A quick way to add motion to a flat surface. Point Wrangle.

snippets.name: Delete Below Height
snippets.description: Removes points under a height threshold — swap the axis or comparison to cull however you like. Point Wrangle (run over Points).

snippets.name: Fit / Remap Value
snippets.description: The bread-and-butter of controlling ranges in VEX: remap an attribute from one range to another. Reads @value, writes @remapped. Point Wrangle.

snippets.name: Push Along Normal
snippets.description: Moves points along their own normal — positive puffs out (peak), negative pulls in. Needs a normal (add a Normal SOP first). Point Wrangle.
snippets.code:
// Extrude points along their normal
@P += normalize(@N) * chf("dist");

snippets.name: Radial Falloff Mask
snippets.description: Builds a 0..1 mask that fades with distance from a target point — the starting block for radial effects. Writes @mask (view it as Cd to preview). Point Wrangle.

snippets.name: Look At Target
snippets.description: Aims each point's normal toward a world-space target — handy before orienting copied geometry. Vector slider: target. Point Wrangle.

snippets.name: Color Ramp Along Curve
snippets.description: Colors a curve from root to tip using a ramp parameter. Add a Ramp (color) parm named 'ramp'. Needs @curveu (Resample or Add SOP). Point Wrangle.
snippets.code:
// Drive color from a ramp along the curve
@Cd = chramp("ramp", @curveu);

snippets.name: Facing Ratio (Fresnel)
snippets.description: How edge-on each point faces the camera — 1 head-on, 0 at grazing angles. A cheap fresnel/rim mask for shading or selection. Point Wrangle.

snippets.name: Nearest Point Distance
snippets.description: Distance from each point to its nearest neighbour in a second input — the core of proximity effects and scatter thinning. Point Wrangle (2 inputs).

snippets.name: Group by Bounding Box
snippets.description: Puts points inside a slider-driven box into a group called 'inside'. A template for procedural selections. Point Wrangle.

snippets.name: Python: Point Count
snippets.description: A minimal Python SOP: reports the incoming point count. A clean template to start any Python-driven geometry op. Python SOP.
snippets.code:
node = hou.pwd()
geo = node.geometry()

print("Point count:", len(geo.points()))

snippets.name: Python: Add & Fill Attribute
snippets.description: Creates a float point attribute if missing and fills it per point — the starting point for Python-authored attributes. Python SOP.
